title: larix olgensis var. amurensis
intro: Larix olgensis var. amurensis, also known as the Amur larch, is a variety of larch tree native to Northeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Larix olgensis var. amurensis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
